premises: ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.statement: (x : α) (xs : List α) (ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)) (y : β) (ys : List β) (h : length (x :: xs) = length (y :: ys)) : length xs = length ys

premises: ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.conclusion: zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys))
lemmas.statement: (ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)) (ys : List β) (h' : length xs = length ys) (hL : length (reverse xs) = length (reverse ys)) : zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys))

lemmas.body: (hL : length (reverse xs) = length (reverse ys)) → zip' (reverse xs ++ [x]) (reverse ys ++ [y]) = reverse (zip' xs ys) ++ [(x, y)]
lemmas.conclusion: zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys))
lemmas.statement: (xs : List α) (ys : List β) (h' : length xs = length ys) (hL : length (reverse xs) = length (reverse ys)) (h1 : zip' (reverse xs ++ [x]) (reverse ys ++ [y]) = reverse (zip' xs ys) ++ [(x, y)]) : zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys))
(head✝ : β) (tail✝ : List β) (h : length [] = length (head✝ :: tail✝)) : zip' (reverse []) (reverse (head✝ :: tail✝)) = reverse (zip' [] (head✝ :: tail✝))

premises: ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.conclusion: zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys))
lemmas.statement: (x : α) (xs : List α) (ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)) (y : β) (ys : List β) (h : length (x :: xs) = length (y :: ys)) : zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys))
(ys : List β) (h : length [] = length ys) : zip' (reverse []) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' [] ys)

premises: ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.statement: (x : α) (xs : List α) (ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)) (h : length (x :: xs) = length []) : zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse []) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) [])

premises: ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.conclusion: zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) ys)

lemmas.conclusion: length [] = length ys → zip' (reverse []) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' [] ys)
lemmas.statement: (ys : List β) : length [] = length ys → zip' (reverse []) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' [] ys)
